---
title: Lans en Vercors
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557446/vercors_20210816_hm98vd.png
description: Vue sur une balade
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/08/16
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557446/vercors_20210816_hm98vd.png)
